transitions.name: scheduled_data_ingestion
transitions.description: Triggered at the scheduled time to fetch user data from the Fakerest API.
transitions.end_state_description: User data has been successfully ingested.

process.name: fetch_user_data
process.description: Process to fetch user data from the Fakerest API.

transitions.name: transform_user_data
transitions.description: Transform the fetched user data into a structured format.
transitions.start_state_description: User data has been ingested and is ready for transformation.
transitions.end_state_description: User data has been successfully transformed.

process.name: process_user_data
process.description: Process to transform raw user data.

transitions.name: save_transformed_data
transitions.description: Save the transformed user data in the cloud database.
transitions.start_state_description: Transformed user data is ready to be saved.
transitions.end_state_description: Transformed user data has been successfully saved.

process.name: save_data
process.description: Process to save transformed user data.

transitions.name: generate_monthly_report
transitions.description: Generate a report based on the transformed user data.
transitions.start_state_description: Transformed user data is available for reporting.
transitions.end_state_description: Monthly report has been successfully generated.

process.name: create_report
process.description: Process to create a monthly report.

transitions.name: send_report_to_admin
transitions.description: Send the generated monthly report via email to the admin.
transitions.start_state_description: Report has been generated and is ready to be sent.
transitions.end_state_description: Monthly report has been successfully sent to the admin.

process.name: email_report
process.description: Process to send the report to the admin's email.
